executive_summary: All three user stories are now compliant. US-002 and US-003 were fully implemented in the backend. US-001 (Frontend single-prompt input) was absent at audit time — it was remediated by adding 'llm' to GenerationMode, the mode selector, and updating the UI to hide parameter controls and show a creative director textarea. TypeScript typechecks pass with no errors.
minor_observations: OrchestrationFailedError not explicitly handled in routes/api.py — falls through to generic HTTP 500 handler.
Env var REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE differs from PRD-specified REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_TYPE.
progress.json incorrectly marked US-001 as completed before any frontend code was written.
23 pre-existing App.test.tsx failures exist unrelated to this iteration.

refactor_plan.title: Add OrchestrationFailedError route handler
refactor_plan.description: Register a dedicated exception handler in backend/routes/api.py returning HTTP 422/503 with descriptive JSON to distinguish orchestration failures from generic pipeline errors.

refactor_plan.title: Resolve REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE vs REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_TYPE naming
refactor_plan.description: Align implementation env var name with PRD or update PRD. Add to operator documentation.

refactor_plan.title: Fix pre-existing App.test.tsx failures
refactor_plan.description: Investigate and resolve 23 pre-existing test failures to restore a green frontend test suite.

refactor_plan.title: Add frontend llm mode tests
refactor_plan.description: Add tests covering: llm mode hides parameters; dispatches correct payload; empty brief shows error; queue entry created correctly.
